movies.title: 痴迷
movies.summary: 在折断神秘的“心愿柳”以赢得暗恋对象的心之后，一个对爱情充满幻想的人如愿以偿地得到了自己想要的一切，但很快他发现，有些欲望需要付出黑暗而可怕的代价。
movies.summaryEn: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinis

movies.title: 福尔摩斯小姐3
movies.summary: 侦探伊诺拉·福尔摩斯前往马耳他探险，并打算在那里结婚，但夏洛克的失踪令其卷入一桩危险的案件。
movies.summaryEn: Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

movies.title: 穿普拉达的女王2
movies.summary: 随着传统出版业的式微，时尚女王米兰达在职业生涯中迎来新挑战。她不得不与手握广告预算的曾经的助理，如今已是奢侈品牌集团高管的艾米莉正面交锋。两人在行业变局中展开了一场关乎权力与生存的较量。
movies.summaryEn: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand th

movies.title: 小黄人与大怪兽
movies.summary: 为了拍摄心中理想的怪兽电影，这群萌趣活宝四处物色演员，竟然真的集齐了各式怪兽，上演疯狂大乱斗！
movies.summaryEn: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to t

movies.title: 玩具总动员5
movies.summary: 胡迪、巴斯光年、翠斯等“元老级”玩具将跟随小主人邦妮的成长脚步，共同迎接数字时代下的全新挑战。随着无所不能的科技产品逐渐走进童年世界，一批充满科技感的崭新角色也随之重磅亮相：青蛙造型的智能平板小荷、憨态可掬的导航玩具小不丢、活力十足的抓拍好手小拍侠，以及自带笑点的臭屁小机灵。当身边的同龄朋友们开始沉浸在科技玩具带来的“电子陪伴”中，而玩具伙伴们也迎来了前所未有的生存难题：在屏幕占据注意力的时代，玩
movies.summaryEn: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new

movies.title: 后室
movies.summary: 一位心理治疗师的病人，在一次诡异的事故中“切入”到了一个超越现实的奇异维度。为了带回病人，这位治疗师不得不亲自踏入那片无边无际、充满黄色壁纸和嗡嗡荧光灯响声的未知迷宫。
movies.summaryEn: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.

movies.title: 超级少女
movies.summary: 当一位冷酷无情、突如其来的劲敌突袭家园，“超级少女”卡拉·佐-艾尔不得不与一位意想不到的同伴结盟，横跨星际，踏上一段交织复仇与正义的壮阔征途。
movies.summaryEn: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and j

movies.title: 奥德赛
movies.summary: 特洛伊战争结束后，伊萨卡国王奥德修斯踏上了返回家乡的艰险旅程。
movies.summaryEn: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters,

movies.title: 绵羊侦探团
movies.summary: 影片改编自莱奥妮·斯万的畅销小说。牧羊人乔治最爱给羊群读侦探小说，没想到自己有一天会离奇死亡。他留下的3000万巨额遗产，让每个人貌似都有犯罪动机。警察毫无头绪之时，羊群们决定“不务正业”迈出牧场，追查牧羊人“躺平”真相！它们秉承着遇见麻烦就吃草，嗅到危险就躺倒的哲学，却迎来了一个意想不到的结果……
movies.summaryEn: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep rea

movies.title: 海洋奇缘：启航
movies.summary: 海的召唤，从未停止。熟悉的旋律响起，属于“莫阿娜”的冒险，再次扬帆启航。
movies.summaryEn: Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.

tv.title: 权力的游戏前传：龙族
tv.summary: 在维斯特洛大陆，坦格利安家族的衰落被公之于众。一场被称为“血龙狂舞”的内战即将爆发。
tv.summaryEn: The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights. In the case of the Targaryens, their slow fall begins wh

tv.title: 末日地堡
tv.summary: 该剧基于休·豪伊所著同名畅销科幻系列小说改编，在一个满目疮痍、有毒物质遍布的未来世界中，成千上万的人居住在深埋在地下的巨大筒仓里。在警长违反了一项基本规则以及有些居民神秘死亡后，工程师朱丽叶开始揭开惊人的秘密和筒仓的真相。
tv.summaryEn: In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously, engineer Juliette starts to uncover shocking sec

tv.title: 梦魇绝镇
tv.summary: 本剧讲述美国中部一个噩梦般的小镇会困住所有走进来的人，而不甘愿留下来的人在找寻出路的同时，他们还得面对日落后出没的怪物。
tv.summaryEn: Unravel the mystery of a nightmarish town in middle America that traps all those who enter. As the unwilling residents fight to keep a sense of normalcy and search for a way out, they must also surviv

tv.title: 气体人第一号
tv.summary:
本作是以1960年上映的东宝特摄电影『ガス人間第1号』《气体人第一号》（导演：本多猪四郎，编剧：木村武）为原作，由日韩的创作者以现代视角重新构建的完全原创故事重启作品。

当一位嘉宾评论员在直播中肿胀爆炸时，这种前所未有、难以想象的犯罪令全世界陷入震惊。在这起可怕的谋杀背后，是一个似乎凭空消失的人：气体人。由于没有人能够掌握他的真实身份，这个未知者宣布将执行一系列针对性暗杀行动。他在每一次无法解释
tv.summaryEn: A death on live TV. A culprit who turns to gas. Behind it, a secret project that used and discarded the vulnerable. One detective pursues the dark truth.

tv.title: X战警97
tv.summary: 由变种人组成的X战警利用他们不可思议的天赋，保护一个痛恨又恐惧他们的世界，接受前所未有的挑战，并面临出乎意料的危险新未来。
tv.summaryEn: The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a dangerous and unexpected new future.

tv.title: 金特务：本色回归
tv.summary: 改编自同名网络漫画，讲述的是原本只想平凡当个父亲的金部长，在挚爱的女儿突然失踪后，不得不揭开自己极力隐藏的真实身份，为了救回女儿不惜一切的故事。
tv.summaryEn: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

tv.title: 降世神通：最后的气宗
tv.summary: 人称“神通王”的小男孩必须掌握四种元素之力，以拯救战火纷飞的世界，击败一心阻碍他的冷酷敌人。
tv.summaryEn: A young boy known as the Avatar must master the four elemental powers to save a world at war — and fight a ruthless enemy bent on stopping him.

tv.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事
tv.summary: “我要在这个异世界拿出真本事！”34岁童贞且无职的家里蹲男子，在父母的葬礼当天被赶出家门后，在路上被一辆卡车所撞死。意识清醒后，他发现自己居然作为一个刚出生的婴儿转生到了剑与魔法的异世界！像废物一样活过了前世的男子，发誓要作为少年·鲁迪乌斯在异世界以认真的态度好好活下去！等待着鲁迪乌斯的是，与娇小魔术师、有着精灵长耳又很男孩子气的美少女、凶暴的傲娇大小姐以及其他性格各异的人们之间的邂逅，当然也还有
tv.summaryEn: When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every opportunity to live the life he's always wanted.

tv.title: 检察官的提案
tv.summary: 曾因“杀人犯之子”的标签饱受欺凌的李彩河，在洗清冤屈后成为一名八级检察院调查员。他被分配到檀岘分局，努力开启新生活，却意外与曾帮助过他的检察官朱泰善重逢。朱泰善性格完美主义且敏感古怪，在一次共同值夜班后，他对李彩河产生了浓厚兴趣。为了调查一桩悬而未决的谋杀案，朱泰善提议李彩河担任自己的专属调查员。两人在压抑又充满张力的办公环境下，展开了一场徘徊于职场正义与禁忌情感之间的危险博弈。
tv.summaryEn: A victim’s son and a killer’s son reunite as a prosecutor and investigator, fighting systemic corruption while becoming each other's salvation.

tv.title: 达顿牧场
tv.summary: 抛开《黄石》时期经历的阴影，Beth和Rip努力共筑未来，但他们遭遇了残酷的新现实，以及一家不择手段、只为保住自己帝国的无情敌对牧场。在南得克萨斯州，血脉之深远胜于一切，宽恕转瞬即逝，而生存的代价，或许正是你的灵魂。
tv.summaryEn: Rip Wheeler and Beth Dutton gamble everything on a new life in South Texas, but the promise of building a future far from the ghosts of Yellowstone quickly collides with brutal new realities and a riv

music.title: DREAMBOY (UNFINISHED)
music.highlight: Lil Nas X未完成的自传式流行宣言
music.highlightEn: Lil Nas X's unfinished autobiographical pop manifesto
music.summary: Lil Nas X以其标志性的跨界风格，呈现一张未完成的专辑，融合流行、说唱与实验元素，充满个人叙事与社会评论。
music.summaryEn: Lil Nas X delivers an unfinished album blending pop, rap, and experimental elements, rich with personal narrative and social commentary.

music.title: Thunk
music.highlight: 澳洲传奇Jim Moginie的独立摇滚即兴
music.highlightEn: Australian legend Jim Moginie's indie rock improvisation
music.summary: 前Midnight Oil成员Jim Moginie与The Family Dog合作，呈现一张充满即兴与实验精神的独立摇滚专辑。
music.summaryEn: Ex-Midnight Oil member Jim Moginie collaborates with The Family Dog for an indie rock album full of improvisation and experimental spirit.

music.title: Warehouse 2026: 7.16.2025 Allianz Amphitheater At Riverfront, Richmond, VA
music.summary: Dave Matthews Band的最新现场专辑，收录2025年里士满演出，充满即兴与乐队标志性的活力。
music.summaryEn: Dave Matthews Band's latest live album captures their 2025 Richmond show, full of improvisation and the band's signature energy.

music.title: Euphoria
music.summary: Schiller的新作延续其标志性的氛围流行风格，空灵旋律与电子音色交织，营造梦幻听觉体验。
music.summaryEn: Schiller's new work continues his signature ambient pop style, weaving ethereal melodies with electronic textures for a dreamy listening experience.

music.title: Living Free (Live Manchester '75)
music.highlight: Don McLean的1975年曼彻斯特现场
music.summary: Don McLean的经典现场录音，捕捉1975年曼彻斯特演出的真挚与温暖，民谣爱好者不容错过。
music.summaryEn: Don McLean's classic live recording captures the sincerity and warmth of his 1975 Manchester performance, a must for folk fans.

music.title: RAVEPOP
music.artist: r u s s e l b u c k
music.highlight: r u s s e l b u c k的电子狂欢
music.highlightEn: r u s s e l b u c k's electronic rave
music.summary: RAVEPOP是一张充满活力的电子专辑，融合舞曲与氛围元素，适合派对与沉浸式聆听。
music.summaryEn: RAVEPOP is an energetic electronic album blending dance and ambient elements, perfect for parties and immersive listening.

music.title: One Moment in Time: Live in the USA
music.summary: Robin Trower的现场专辑，展现其精湛的布鲁斯摇滚吉他技艺，氛围浓烈。
music.summaryEn: Robin Trower's live album showcases his masterful blues-rock guitar skills in an intense atmosphere.

music.title: Electric Fantasy
music.summary: Electric Fantasy是一张氛围电子专辑，充满梦幻与超现实色彩，适合放松与遐想。
music.summaryEn: Electric Fantasy is an ambient electronic album with dreamy and surreal colors, ideal for relaxation and reverie.

music.title: Eingenordet
music.summary: Versengold的新专辑融合民谣与金属，充满叙事性与中世纪风情，适合民谣金属爱好者。
music.summaryEn: Versengold's new album blends folk and metal, full of narrative and medieval flair, perfect for folk metal fans.

music.title: Pause for a moment
music.summary: Pause for a moment是一张轻松的爵士摇摆专辑，适合悠闲午后或小憩时光。
music.summaryEn: Pause for a moment is a relaxed jazz swing album, perfect for lazy afternoons or a break.
